text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a day out with Winning Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I'm in a huge pinch, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm surrounded by the delicious smell of all kinds
of food!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's almost dinner time, so the aroma is just so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I'm so hungry! I can't handle it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can we eat some croquettes? I know this
really good place...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sob... Mommy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer, hold up! This little girl is crying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did you lose your mommy?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Where's my mommy? Hic... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You poor thing! You must've been so scared!
Waaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we gotta stay with her until she finds her
mom!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww, thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! Don't worry! I'll stay with you, so everything's gonna be fine!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Thank you... But, um, your nose is dripping...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Look! Is that your mommy?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Not here either...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aaaahhh! Even when our search is fruitless, you
don't shed a tear! You're so... so braaaaave!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: It's okay... don't cry.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! Yeah! I'll be brave too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Haha! Now your tummy's crying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'll tell my tummy to be brave too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It sure is taking a while to find your mom though,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you have any ideas that might help?
choice_data_list:
It's best not to wander. We should wait for her
here.
If only there was a place that had a good view...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! I'll stay here and not move an inch.
I'll be like a statue!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We'll wait right here until your mommy comes
back! Don't move!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: 'Kay! I can do it if you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww... You're so... so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh! So sweet and braaaave!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yuki!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Mommy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's her?! I'm so glad! R-really glad!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I heard crying and came right over. Thank you so
much.

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Don't cry too much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But it's so touching... I can't s-stop the teeeaars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text:
Now your eyes and your tummy are crying
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the cries of sadness and joy—as well as
hunger—Winning Ticket did a great job looking
out for the lost girl.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A view... Like somewhere high up?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I don't see any buildings to climb around
here, and I'll get yelled at if I go up a telephone
pole...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, I know! I can carry her on my shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you wanna go for a ride, so you can look for
your mommy from up high?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Wooow! So high!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: How is it? See your mommy anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow! Don't grab my ears!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text: Thank you so, so much.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My pleasure! I'm glad you found your mommy!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Phew, all's well that ends well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh right, we were about to buy some croquettes.
choice_data_list: I'll treat you. I think you've earned it.
I'll treat you. I think you've earned it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Then let's hit it! The faster we go, the
faster we eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket did such a good job looking after
the lost girl, she even forgot about her empty
stomach.
